app_metadata.description: Connect your devices into a secure WireGuard®-based overlay network with SSO, MFA and granular access controls.
app_metadata.name: netbird-server

run_as_context.description: Container [dashboard] runs as root user and group.
Container [server] can run as any non-root user and group.

app_metadata.title: NetBird Server

groups.name: User and Group Configuration
groups.description: Configure User and Group for NetBird Server

attrs.label: NetBird Address
attrs.description:
The address that NetBird Server will be accessible at.</br>
This should be in the format of [protocol]://[domain]:[port], e.g. https://netbird-mgmt.example.com:443</br>
The protocol must https. A reverse proxy must be configured to handle TLS termination and forward traffic to NetBird.</br>

attrs.label: Store Encryption Key
attrs.description:
The encryption key for NetBird Server.</br>
Generate a random 32-byte key using the following command:</br>
`openssl rand -base64 32`

attrs.label: Auth Secret
attrs.description:
The authentication secret for NetBird Server.</br>
Generate a random 32-byte key using the following command and remove any trailing `=` characters:</br>
`openssl rand -base64 32 | sed s/=//g`

attrs.label: Use Embedded Identity Provider
attrs.description:
Whether to use the embedded identity provider for authentication.</br>
If false, an external identity provider must be configured.</br>
When true it adds envs like AUTH_CLIENT_ID, AUTH_AUDIENCE, USE_AUTH0 and AUTH_SUPPORTED_SCOPES to the dashboard container.

attrs.label: User ID
attrs.description: The user id that Netbird Server files will be owned by.

attrs.label: Group ID
attrs.description: The group id that Netbird Server files will be owned by.

attrs.label: WebUI Port
attrs.description: Internally it will always be exposed on port 80

attrs.label: Port Bind Mode
attrs.description:
The port bind mode.</br>
- Publish: The port will be published on the host for external access.</br>
- Expose: The port will be exposed for inter-container communication.</br>
- None: The port will not be exposed or published.</br>
Note: If the Dockerfile defines an EXPOSE directive,
the port will still be exposed for inter-container communication regardless of this setting.

enum.description: Publish port on the host for external access

attrs.label: Host IPs
attrs.description: IPs on the host to bind this port

attrs.label: Name
attrs.description:
The name of the network to join.</br>
The network must already exist.

attrs.description: The containers to add to this network.

attrs.label: Aliases (Optional)
attrs.description: The network aliases to use for this container on this network.

attrs.description: The network interface name to use for this network

attrs.label: MAC Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The MAC address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: IPv4 Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The IPv4 address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: IPv6 Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The IPv6 address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: Gateway Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates the priority of the gateway for this network interface.

attrs.label: Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates in which order Compose connects the service's containers to its networks.

1.0.9.readme:
NetBird Server

NetBird Server - Connect your devices into a secure WireGuard®-based overlay network with SSO, MFA and granular access controls.
